notes: IACR ePrint Archive hosts cryptography research preprints. IDs use YYYY/NNN format.

data.description: IACR ePrint preprint identified by year and sequence number.
data.notes: IACR (International Association for Cryptologic Research) operates the ePrint archive for rapid dissemination of cryptography research. Papers are assigned sequential numbers within each year. Not peer-reviewed, but widely referenced in the cryptography community.
